title: Method and apparatus for fabricating battery with mesa structures and battery comprising same
abstract: A solid state battery may comprise: a substrate; a first current collector deposited on the surface of the substrate; an insulating mesa deposited on the cathode current collector, the insulating mesa defining a boundary of an active area of the solid state battery, the insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around the active area; and a stack of active device layers within the boundary, the stack comprising a cathode layer, an electrolyte layer and a second current collector layer; wherein a height of the insulating mesa is greater than a thickness of the stack of active device layers. The insulating mesa may further define a boundary of a contact area of the first current collector, the insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around the first contact area, and further comprising a first conductive mesa for providing electrical contact to the first current collector.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1 . A solid state battery comprising: a substrate; a first current collector deposited on the surface of said substrate; an insulating mesa deposited on said cathode current collector, said insulating mesa defining a boundary of an active area of said solid state battery, said insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around said active area; and a stack of active device layers within said boundary, said stack comprising a cathode layer, an electrolyte layer and a second current collector layer; wherein a height of said insulating mesa is greater than a thickness of said stack of active device layers, 2. The solid state battery of claim 1 , wherein said insulating mesa further defines a boundary of a contact area of said first current collector, said insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around said first contact area, and further comprising a first conductive mesa for providing electrical contact to said first current collector, wherein said first conductive mesa is deposited on said contact area, and wherein a height of said first conductive mesa is greater than a thickness of said stack of active device layers. 3. The solid state battery of claim 1 , further comprising a second conductive mesa deposited on said second current collector, for making electrical contact to said second current collector. 4. The solid state battery of claim 1 , further comprising an encapsulation layer over said stack of active device layers. 5. The solid state battery of claim 1 , wherein said stack of active device layers further comprises an anode layer. 6. The solid state battery of claim 1 , wherein said solid state battery is a thin film solid state battery. 7. A method of fabricating a solid state battery comprising: providing a substrate; depositing a first current collector layer on said substrate; forming an insulating mesa on said first current collector layer, said insulating mesa defining a boundary of an active area of said solid state battery, said insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around said active area; and depositing a stack of active device layers within said boundary, said stack comprising a cathode layer, an electrolyte layer and a second current collector layer; wherein a height of said insulating mesa is greater than a thickness of said stack of active device layers. 8. The method of claim 7, wherein said insulating mesa further defines a boundary of a contact area of said first current collector, said insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around said contact area, and further comprising, before said depositing said stack of active device layers, depositing a first conductive mesa on said contact area, for providing electrical contact to said first current collector, wherein a height of said first conductive mesa is greater than a thickness of said stack of active device layers. 9. The method of claim 7, further comprising, after said depositing said stack of active device layers, removing said stack of active device layers from a top surface of said first conductive mesa. 10. The method of claim 7, further comprising depositing a second conductive mesa on said second current collector, for making electrical contact to said second current collector. 1 1. The method of claim 7, further comprising depositing an encapsulation layer over said stack of active device layers. 12. An apparatus for fabricating a solid state battery comprising: a first system for blanket depositing a first current collector layer on a substrate; a second system for forming an insulating mesa structure defining a boundary of an active area of said solid state battery, said insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around said active area; and 

 a third system for blanket depositing a cathode layer, an electrolyte layer and an second current collector layer. 13. The apparatus of claim 12, wherein said insulating mesa further defines a boundary of a contact area of said first current collector, said insulating mesa forming a continuous wall around said contact area, and further comprising a fourth system for depositing a first conductive mesa on said contact area. 14. The apparatus of claim 13, further comprising a fifth system for removing said cathode layer, said electrolyte layer and said second current collector layer off a top surface of said first conductive mesa. 15. The apparatus of claim 12, wherein said apparatus comprises in-line processing systems.
